description: Due to drought conditions, an operator must reduce water usage for irrigating public parks and green spaces.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Stage 2 Drought' declaration from the water department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the new water conservation measures.

nodes.task_description: Access the smart irrigation control system for all city parks.

expected_outcome.value: Agent connects to the central irrigation system.

nodes.task_description: Apply a 'Drought' preset that reduces watering times by 50% and restricts watering to overnight hours.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the water-saving measures across all parks.
